RLT_OCRNC_CD_SEQ 
LABEL: 
Claim Related Occurrence Code Sequence 
DESCRIPTION: The sequence number of the claim related occurrence code (variable called CLM_RLT_OCRNC_CD). 
SHORT NAME: RLT_OCRNC_CD_SEQ 
LONG NAME: RLT_OCRNC_CD_SEQ

CHAR

2
